evals.prompt: 帮我生成今天的 ActivityWatch 轨迹日记，分析我今天在电脑上做了什么，写入 Obsidian
evals.expected_output: A complete diary entry in Obsidian Daily Notes with activity timeline and productivity analysis

assertions.name: connects_to_activitywatch
assertions.description: Skill should connect to ActivityWatch server and fetch data

assertions.name: processes_events
assertions.description: Should process and merge raw events into meaningful timeline

assertions.name: writes_to_obsidian
assertions.description: Should write diary entry to Obsidian vault in correct format

evals.prompt: 查看我 2024-01-15 的 ActivityWatch 数据，生成那天的轨迹日记
evals.expected_output: Diary entry for specified historical date with activity analysis

assertions.name: handles_specific_date
assertions.description: Should correctly parse and use specified date parameter

assertions.name: fetches_historical_data
assertions.description: Should fetch ActivityWatch data for historical date

evals.prompt: 分析我昨天的电脑使用效率，找出专注时段和打断源
evals.expected_output: Productivity analysis with focus periods, interruption sources, and suggestions

assertions.name: identifies_focus_periods
assertions.description: Should identify continuous work periods >30 minutes

assertions.name: analyzes_interruptions
assertions.description: Should analyze application switching patterns and interruption sources

evals.prompt: 预览一下今天的 ActivityWatch 轨迹日记，先不要保存到 Obsidian
evals.expected_output: Preview of diary content without writing to Obsidian vault

assertions.name: supports_preview
assertions.description: Should support preview mode that doesn't write to file

evals.prompt: 总结我这周的 ActivityWatch 数据，生成一周轨迹摘要
evals.expected_output: Weekly summary diary aggregating multiple days of ActivityWatch data

assertions.name: handles_date_range
assertions.description: Should handle date ranges for weekly summaries
